name: Burzynski Research Institute, Inc.
summary: Burzynski Research Institute, Inc. operates a research and development facility of drugs for use in the treatment of cancer in the United States. The company engages in the research, development, production, marketing, promotion, and sale of medical chemical compounds composed of growth-inhibiting peptides, amino acid derivatives, and organic acids under the Antineoplastons name. It also provides consulting services. Burzynski Research Institute, Inc. was founded in 1977 and is based in Houston, Texas.
